systemStatus.headline: Thu Jul 16, 4 AM email-only run. Toast Wed Jul 15 + Sling Thu Jul 16 have NOT landed yet (they arrive ~6-7 AM) -- freshest data is still Tue Jul 14 (net $5,749.85, labor 24.1%). NEW overnight: Matthew left a 5-star for The Brewhouse (rating only). GOOD NEWS: the Toast Payroll withdrawal (Jun 28-Jul 11) is scheduled for TODAY Jul 16 (pay date Jul 17) -- the open payroll item is resolved. World Cup Final reservations building for Sun Jul 19.
systemStatus.detail:
Thu Jul 16 4 AM run -- EMAIL ONLY (no live Chrome scrape). Toast group/location daily for Wed Jul 15 lands ~6:24 AM; Sling for Thu Jul 16 lands ~7 AM -- neither available at 4 AM, so sales + today's schedule below are the last captured (Tue Jul 14 Toast / Wed Jul 15 Sling).

TOAST (Tue Jul 14, latest available): net $5,749.85 / gross $6,066.65 / 239 guests / 154 orders / avg guest $24.06 / labor 24.1% ($1,385.71) -- up 0.3% net vs same day last week ($5,730.02). Wed Jul 15 numbers not yet emailed.

SLING (Wed Jul 15, latest available): 13 staff / 48.49 hrs / 0 uncovered / 0 OT. Thu Jul 16 schedule not yet emailed. Two malformed 24-hr shifts persist (Isael/Cook, Casey/GM).

REVIEWS: NEW Matthew Lourie 5-star for The Brewhouse (Jul 16, rating only). Still unanswered from earlier: David Makosch 5-star (Brewhouse, burgers+beer) and Fleur Smits van Oyen 5-star (Brewhouse Coffee). BOTH listings checked. Reply drafts in the email -- Joal approves before posting.

PAYROLL -- RESOLVED: Toast Payroll withdrawal (Jun 28-Jul 11, Checking ..0653) is scheduled for today Jul 16, pay date Jul 17. Confirms it was submitted/funded.

GOOGLE ADS: 2 routine report emails in last 24h, 0 disapprovals. BHC Coffee Search CPC still the standing watch item (not re-scraped this email-only run). YELP: no actionable inquiries. TRIPADVISOR: no ad report.

RESERVATIONS: Sun Jul 19 World Cup Final building -- Jason Price (6, 'two families for the Final') + Ruju Patel (4), both 11 AM.

toast.source: GROUP-level Daily Performance Summary (The Brewhouse Santa Barbara Group, Tue Jul 14), email received Wed Jul 15 6:24 AM PT -- parsed on the Wed Jul 15 7 AM run. LOCATION-level email (SDLW/4-week, voids $, dayparts, rooms) lands ~7:40 AM PT and was not yet available.
toast.note: TUE JUL 14: Net $5,749.85 / Gross $6,066.65 / 239 guests / 154 orders / avg guest $24.06 / avg order $37.34 / discounts 5.2% ($315.47 derived) / 9 void items / refunds $0 / 1 takeout order ($18.00) / 120 card payments / 2 open orders. Labor 24.1% of net ($1,385.71 derived) -- elevated vs the usual 18-19%, but well down from Monday's 35.8%. Nathan Smith auto-clocked-out (inflates labor slightly); he is also on today's schedule. No SDLW / 4-week yet. [Thu Jul 16 4 AM: Wed Jul 15 daily summary not yet emailed; this Tue Jul 14 data remains the latest available.]

sling.note: TODAY (Wed Jul 15), delivered ~7:03 AM PT: 13 employees / 13 shifts / 48.49 scheduled hours / 0 uncovered / 0 OT / 0 off. Up from Tue Jul 14 (10 staff / 47.82 hrs). TWO malformed 24-hour shifts this time -- Isael Salvador Narciso (Cook) 4:32A-4:32A and Casey Smith (GM) 6:42A-6:42A -- same Sling entry bug that drives the auto-clock-outs, now hitting the GM. Nathan Smith (Server 11:30A-4:00P) was auto-clocked-out on yesterday's Toast closeout. [Thu Jul 16 4 AM: Thu Jul 16 schedule not yet emailed; this Wed Jul 15 schedule remains the latest available.]

Yesterday (Jul 14): $83.86 / 6,545 impr / 118 clicks / 0 conv (calculating). *** BHC Coffee | Search | P1 Launch remains the problem line: 170 impr, 10 clicks, $40.95 -- CPC $4.09, ~10x PMax's $0.40; 49% of spend for 8.5% of clicks.
